strengths: ~20 years of continuous software engineering experience across web, embedded, mobile, and infrastructure, satisfying the 15-year minimum
Recent hands-on AI infrastructure work at re:cinq including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks directly relevant to the AI focus
Demonstrated knowledge-sharing through conference talks and multi-day workshops aligns with the 'inspire others internally and externally' responsibility
concerns: Current title is Staff Software Engineer — no evidence of director-level IC scope, strategic advisory work, or influencing executive or cross-organizational decisions
AI exposure is narrow and recent (current role only); no recognized AI expertise, published AI-powered products at scale, or ML/AI academic credentials
No cloud platform strategy experience; background is primarily application-layer engineering rather than cloud architecture or AI platform product ownership
response.justification: Aisha brings genuine breadth of engineering experience and a recent pivot toward AI tooling that shows promising trajectory, but the role demands a director-level individual contributor recognized for AI strategy and cloud platform expertise — a profile that does not match her current Staff-level scope, limited AI depth, and absence of strategic advisory or executive-influence experience.
